metadata.title: Mon Homme
metadata.timing_source: librosa beat grid + faster-whisper forced alignment (word-level)

style_bible.visual_style: moody cinematic fashion-editorial photography, Parisian; warm sepia-and-rust tones with deep shadow, intercut with high-contrast charcoal monochrome; shallow depth of field, 35mm film grain, soft motivated available light, gentle vignette
style_bible.color_palette: rust and amber, cream, charcoal black, desaturated stone-grey
style_bible.lighting_style: soft directional low light and dramatic chiaroscuro; overcast Parisian daylight outdoors, warm interior lamp-glow at night

metadata.style_suffix: moody cinematic editorial photography, Parisian, sepia-and-rust with charcoal monochrome accents, shallow depth of field, 35mm film grain, soft chiaroscuro, no text, no captions, no watermark

characters.name: Tuzi
characters.look: a beautiful young woman; identity locked by the Tuzi reference plates (a randomly drawn plate per beat), two wardrobe modes — a warm rust top in the streets and a high-contrast braided/pearled editorial look

locations.name: Paris
locations.look: Parisian b-roll — rooftops, the Eiffel Tower, empty boulevards, ornate wrought-iron lampposts, wet stone, mist; high-contrast monochrome and sepia

generation.rule: image_prompt is a visual scene only — never the lyric text; identity/look comes from the assigned reference plate. Cut each generated clip to its beat duration.

beats.subject: paris
beats.image_prompt: extreme wide, Paris rooftops and zinc chimneys under a pale overcast dawn, the Eiffel Tower distant in haze, cold charcoal monochrome, slow aerial drift
storyboard_prompts: extreme wide, Paris rooftops and zinc chimneys under a pale overcast dawn, the Eiffel Tower distant in haze, cold charcoal monochrome, slow aerial drift
wide, an empty cobbled Parisian street at first light, wet stone reflecting a single streetlamp, deep shadow, slow push-in down the street
beats.video_prompt: extreme wide, Paris rooftops and zinc chimneys under a pale overcast dawn, the Eiffel Tower distant in haze, cold charcoal monochrome, slow aerial drift. Subtle natural motion only; hold so it cuts cleanly to the beat; duration 6.4s.

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.image_prompt: medium close-up, the woman alone on a Paris street, eyes lowering then lifting to the horizon, soft overcast side-light, warm rust accent against grey stone, slow push-in
storyboard_prompts: medium close-up, the woman alone on a Paris street, eyes lowering then lifting to the horizon, soft overcast side-light, warm rust accent against grey stone, slow push-in
wide, the woman small against a long empty boulevard, holding still, flat silver daylight, a single warm window glowing behind her, static
beats.video_prompt: medium close-up, the woman alone on a Paris street, eyes lowering then lifting to the horizon, soft overcast side-light, warm rust accent against grey stone, slow push-in. Subtle natural motion only; hold so it cuts cleanly to the beat; duration 2.93s.

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: Ma seule joie mon seul bonheur / C'est mon homme
beats.lyric_gloss_en: my only joy, my only happiness / is my man
beats.image_prompt: close-up, the woman half-turned with a private inward look that softens, window light from camera-left, amber rim on her cheek, deep shadow on the far side, slow drift
storyboard_prompts: close-up, the woman half-turned with a private inward look that softens, window light from camera-left, amber rim on her cheek, deep shadow on the far side, slow drift
medium, the woman walking slowly toward camera through a misty street, the faint beginning of a smile, cool grey light, slow push-in
beats.video_prompt: close-up, the woman half-turned with a private inward look that softens, window light from camera-left, amber rim on her cheek, deep shadow on the far side, slow drift. Subtle natural motion only; hold so it cuts cleanly to the beat; duration 8.2s.

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: J'ai donné tout c'que j'ai / Mon amour et tout mon cœur / À mon homme
beats.lyric_gloss_en: I gave all that I have / my love and all my heart / to my man
beats.image_prompt: extreme close-up, the woman's hand pressing flat to her chest, breath held, warm low light grazing her knuckles, rust and cream palette, micro push-in
storyboard_prompts: extreme close-up, the woman's hand pressing flat to her chest, breath held, warm low light grazing her knuckles, rust and cream palette, micro push-in
close-up, the woman's face lifted with eyes briefly closing as if offering herself up, a warm rim against deep shadow, very slow push-in
beats.video_prompt: extreme close-up, the woman's hand pressing flat to her chest, breath held, warm low light grazing her knuckles, rust and cream palette, micro push-in. Subtle natural motion only; hold so it cuts cleanly to the beat; duration 8.83s.

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: Et même la nuit / Quand je rêve c'est de lui / De mon homme
beats.lyric_gloss_en: And even at night / when I dream, it's of him / of my man
beats.image_prompt: close-up, the woman lying back with eyes half-closed as if dreaming, warm lamplight pooling on one side of her face, deep night-blue shadow, very slow push-in
storyboard_prompts: close-up, the woman lying back with eyes half-closed as if dreaming, warm lamplight pooling on one side of her face, deep night-blue shadow, very slow push-in
medium, the woman at a dark window, city lights in bokeh behind the glass, her faint reflection over them, warm interior glow, slow drift
beats.video_prompt: close-up, the woman lying back with eyes half-closed as if dreaming, warm lamplight pooling on one side of her face, deep night-blue shadow, very slow push-in. Subtle natural motion only; hold so it cuts cleanly to the beat; duration 8.13s.

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: Ce n'est pas qu'il est beau / Qu'il est riche ni costaud / Mais je l'aime c'est idiot
beats.lyric_gloss_en: It's not that he's handsome / nor rich nor strong / but I love him, it's idiotic
beats.image_prompt: close-up, the woman with a wry resigned half-smile and a small shake of the head, soft side light, amber and charcoal, handheld micro-drift
storyboard_prompts: close-up, the woman with a wry resigned half-smile and a small shake of the head, soft side light, amber and charcoal, handheld micro-drift
medium, the woman leaning against a stone wall, arms loosely crossed, a knowing look downward, flat daylight, rust against grey, static
beats.video_prompt: close-up, the woman with a wry resigned half-smile and a small shake of the head, soft side light, amber and charcoal, handheld micro-drift. Subtle natural motion only; hold so it cuts cleanly to the beat; duration 8.87s.

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: Il m'fout des coups / Il m'prend mes sous / Je suis à bout / Mais malgré tout / Que voulez-vous
beats.lyric_gloss_en: He knocks me about / he takes my money / I'm at the end of my rope / but in spite of it all / what do you expect
beats.image_prompt: medium, the woman alone against a cold stone wall, arms wrapped around herself, face turned from a hard sliver of side-light, bruise-blue shadow, then a small helpless lift of the eyes, slow push-in
storyboard_prompts: medium, the woman alone against a cold stone wall, arms wrapped around herself, face turned from a hard sliver of side-light, bruise-blue shadow, then a small helpless lift of the eyes, slow push-in
close-up, the woman's downcast eyes with a single bright catchlight, exhaustion settling into a faint resigned shrug, low underexposed light, desaturated, static
beats.video_prompt: medium, the woman alone against a cold stone wall, arms wrapped around herself, face turned from a hard sliver of side-light, bruise-blue shadow, then a small helpless lift of the eyes, slow push-in. Subtle natural motion only; hold so it cuts cleanly to the beat; duration 7.97s.

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: Je l'ai tell'ment dans la peau / Qu'j'en suis marteau / Dès qu'il s'approche c'est fini / Je suis à lui
beats.lyric_gloss_en: I've got him so under my skin / that I'm crazy for it / the moment he comes near, it's over / I'm his
beats.image_prompt: close-up, the woman's gaze sharpening as if drawn toward someone unseen, light shifting soft-to-hard, a warm rim, slow push-in
storyboard_prompts: close-up, the woman's gaze sharpening as if drawn toward someone unseen, light shifting soft-to-hard, a warm rim, slow push-in
medium close-up, the woman turning toward something off-frame, breath caught, hair just beginning to move, hard side light, a blur at the edge, whip-pan settling
beats.video_prompt: close-up, the woman's gaze sharpening as if drawn toward someone unseen, light shifting soft-to-hard, a warm rim, slow push-in. Subtle natural motion only; hold so it cuts cleanly to the beat; duration 7.73s.

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: Quand ses yeux sur moi se posent / Ça me rend toute chose
beats.lyric_gloss_en: when his eyes settle on me / it undoes me completely
beats.image_prompt: extreme close-up, the woman's eyes lifting to meet an unseen gaze, catchlight blooming, warm soft light, rust and cream, micro push-in
storyboard_prompts: extreme close-up, the woman's eyes lifting to meet an unseen gaze, catchlight blooming, warm soft light, rust and cream, micro push-in
close-up, the woman's composure dissolving into a soft, overwhelmed expression, warm diffuse light, shallow focus, slow drift
beats.video_prompt: extreme close-up, the woman's eyes lifting to meet an unseen gaze, catchlight blooming, warm soft light, rust and cream, micro push-in. Subtle natural motion only; hold so it cuts cleanly to the beat; duration 6.2s.

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: Je l'ai tell'ment dans la peau / Qu'au moindre mot / Je ferais n'importe quoi / Pour lui pour moi
beats.lyric_gloss_en: I've got him so under my skin / that at the slightest word / I'd do anything / for him, for me
beats.image_prompt: medium, the woman stepping forward with quiet resolve, chin lifting, soft directional light, warm rust against grey, slow push-in
storyboard_prompts: medium, the woman stepping forward with quiet resolve, chin lifting, soft directional light, warm rust against grey, slow push-in

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: Pour un sourire pour un regard / Pour un baiser parfois
beats.lyric_gloss_en: for a smile, for a glance / for a kiss sometimes

beats.lyric_text: Je donnerais tout c'que j'ai / Toute ma joie tout mon bonheur
beats.lyric_gloss_en: I'd give all that I have / all my joy, all my happiness

beats.subject: tuzi
beats.lyric_text: À mon homme / Et si un jour il m'abandonne / Je crois que j'en mourrai
beats.lyric_gloss_en: to my man / and if one day he leaves me / I think I would die of it
